content: I was an accounts executive. I noticed that the bank reconciliation for March 2023 showed ₹4.2 crore credited from ‘Gujarat State IT Department’ but the bank statement showed no such credit. I asked Rajiv. He said the payment was delayed and would be reflected next week. It never was. I checked the client’s bank details—they were registered under a minor’s name in a village in Rajasthan. I showed this to Priya Desai. She looked scared and said, ‘Don’t say anything. You’ll lose your job.’ I reported it to Sunita Rao. She said, ‘Don’t rock the boat.’ I was given a ‘voluntary exit’ package two weeks later. I didn’t sign any NDA. They threatened me with blacklisting if I spoke. I have the audio of my exit interview where I say, ‘I’m leaving because I can’t work here anymore—there’s fraud.’
